nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 2011; const int b = 2097; const int c = 2120; const int d = 2137; const int e = 2152; const int f = 2164; const int g = 2176; const int h = 2188; const int i = 2199; const int j = 2211; const int k = 2223; const int l = 2235; const int m = 2250; const int n = 2267; const int o = 2290; const int p = 2376;
